use_cases: User registration and account creation flow for web applications
Onboarding new users with animated visual feedback
Celebrating successful sign-up with confetti animation
Collecting email and password credentials with validation
ai_summary: Easemize Sign Up is a multi-step authentication form component featuring animated transitions, confetti celebration effects, and password visibility toggles. Built with framer-motion for smooth animations and lucide-react for iconography, it provides a polished user registration experience with modern gradient styling suitable for SaaS platforms and consumer applications.
